message:
feat(http): implement HTTP/2 protocol with frame codec, HPACK, and connection management

Implements HTTP/2 protocol support following RFC 7540 and RFC 7541 (HPACK):

- Frame types: DATA, HEADERS, PRIORITY, RST_STREAM, SETTINGS, PUSH_PROMISE,
  PING, GOAWAY, WINDOW_UPDATE, CONTINUATION with encode/decode
- HPACK header compression with static/dynamic tables and Huffman decoding
- Stream state machine and concurrent stream management
- Connection management with settings negotiation
- Flow control for connection and stream-level windows
- Body trait for HTTP message body handling

All 30 h2 module tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+//! HTTP protocol support for Asupersync.
+//!
+//! This module provides HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 protocol implementations
+//! with cancel-safe body handling and connection pooling.
+//!
+//! # Body Types
+//!
+//! The [`body`] module provides the [`Body`](body::Body) trait and common
+//! implementations for streaming HTTP message bodies.
+//!
+//! # HTTP/2
+//!
+//! The [`h2`] module provides HTTP/2 protocol support including frame
+//! parsing, HPACK compression, and flow control.
+
+pub mod body;
+pub mod h2;
+
+pub use body::{Body, Empty, Frame, Full, HeaderMap, HeaderName, HeaderValue, SizeHint};
